headlines.h: Science Desk Investigates: Toccato and fugue in D mewnor
headlines.b: The peer review process consisted of one stare, two slow blinks, and a decisive nap.
Treat futures up. Productivity down. The couch remains occupied.
Officials confirm this is being treated as a "meow-jor" development. (Filed: 2026-04-20)

headlines.h: Exclusive: Government Announces New Standard: “Yall even get pocket money?"
headlines.b: Applies to boxes, laundry baskets, and your freshly folded clothes (especially those).
